subcodes.first_line: The servant beareth witness that there is none other God but Him, in acknowledgment of His oneness and in confession of His singleness, with certitude [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: یشهد الخادم انه لا اله الا هو اقرارا بوحدانیته و اعترافا بفردانیته و ایقانا
subcodes.subjects: @love as fundamental; spiritual foundations of religion, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @interpretation of dreams and visions, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @call to action, @present and future calamities; war; universal convulsion
